name: webos-terminal
description: Native terminal emulator for LG webOS TVs
author: webOS Homebrew

scripts.pack: node scripts/sync-version.js && enact pack && node scripts/downlevel-syntax.js
scripts.pack-p: node scripts/sync-version.js && enact pack -p && node scripts/downlevel-syntax.js
scripts.build: npm run pack-p && npm run build-service
scripts.build-service: mkdir -p dist/services && cp services/shell_service.js services/services.json services/package.json dist/services/
